name: core
description: Rosetta Core 2.0 - OSS foundation for AI agent instructions, workflows, and guardrails. Includes Rosetta MCP for knowledge base access.

hooks.command: cat "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-core-policy.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-execution-policy.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-guardrails.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-hitl-questioning.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-rosetta-files.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/plugin-files-mode.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/INDEX.md" && echo "" && echo "Rosetta Core Plugin Path: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"

metadata.description: Rosetta Knowledge Base MCP - Access AI agent instructions, workflows, skills, and business context
GitNexus code-graph MCP — caller discovery, impact analysis, and safe refactoring via semantic call graph
metadata.setup: npm install -g gitnexus && npx gitnexus analyze && npx gitnexus setup
